task: close gap gcd: (gcd a b) returns the greatest common divisor of two positive integers a and b. The kernel has NO modulo operator, so use repeated subtraction (Euclid): if a equals b return a; if a is greater than b then gcd of (a minus b) and b; otherwise gcd of a and (b minus a).
reasoning: draft a Form recipe with a local coder oracle; the kernel validates it against (gcd 48 36)

steps.args: close gap gcd: (gcd a b) returns the greatest common divisor of two positive integers a and b. The kernel has NO modulo operator, so use repeated subtraction (Euclid): if a equals b return a; if a is greater than b then gcd of (a minus b) and b; otherwise gcd of a and (b minus a).
steps.result:
(defn gcd (a b)
  (if (eq a b)
    a
    (if (gt a b)
      (gcd (sub a b) b)
      (gcd a (sub b a)))))

answer:
(defn gcd (a b)
  (if (eq a b)
    a
    (if (gt a b)
      (gcd (sub a b) b)
      (gcd a (sub b a)))))
